response.justification: Over 18 years of continuous fullstack engineering experience with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK usage across recent roles — the core stack is a near-direct match. Current position at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement. The only notable gaps are Nest.js (not explicitly named) and Vitest/Playwright (no mention), though the candidate's deep TDD background and authorship of testing frameworks suggest those are learnable gaps rather than structural ones.
strengths: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK confirmed across recent senior roles — primary stack largely covered
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current employer directly meets the AI agent development requirement
Consistently practiced TDD, code review, and CI/CD across multiple companies; authored open-source test runners and assertion libraries
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the entire resume; backend framework experience sits at Express/Vibe.d/custom levels, which may require a ramp-up
Vitest and Playwright are not mentioned; testing history leans heavily on custom D-language tooling and Jest-era practices
Extensive D language output in open-source projects signals a secondary ecosystem investment that may not transfer to the team's stack
